metadata.name: Production Checklist
metadata.description: Ship confidently — automated production readiness scanner with 784 items across web, mobile, API, smart contract, payment systems, and infrastructure/SRE.
metadata.author: byshawnchee

plugins.name: production-checklist-plugin
plugins.description: Scan your codebase for production readiness issues. Auto-detects stack, checks against FAANG-grade checklist, and produces a detailed pass/fail report with fix suggestions.
